subcodes.first_line: O 'Ayn! The Eye of God, which slumber seizeth not, hath turned unto thee. He heareth and seeth, and He is in truth the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عین قد ارتد الیک عین الله التی لم یاخذها النوم یسمع و یری و هو الحق علام
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
